regime_fall.current_status: Iran's regime demonstrates military defiance by downing a U.S. F-35 and rejecting peace proposals, while simultaneously facing severe internal crises including economic collapse warned to occur within weeks, serious civil unrest, hardliner-dominated succession consolidation, and stalled diplomatic negotiations despite U.S. ceasefire attempts.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Iran shot down a U.S. F-35 Lightning II fighter jet with one crew member rescued and one potentially detained, while Trump threatened strikes on Iranian infrastructure and issued a 48-hour ultimatum to open the Strait of Hormuz, signaling escalation despite stalled ceasefire talks.
